creators.hook: Elisa De Toro Arias. Smallest account here at 11.4K followers, 2.6K median, but she also runs a YouTube Shorts channel (median 991) and a podcast. Direct address, not an agency. Early enough that an ongoing deal makes more sense than one post.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hi Elisa,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

You're at 11,400 followers with reels around 2,500 views, and you're already running Instagram, YouTube Shorts and a podcast in parallel. Most creators pick one and stall. We'd rather talk to you at this point than after the rates have moved.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. It takes a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

You post daily about business and AI to people trying to build something, so the honest question is whether this actually saves you hours or just adds a step. That's the question we want you to answer publicly, either way.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration. Because you're early, we're open to structuring it across several posts and both platforms rather than a single Reel.

If you're open to it, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel, and for a Reel plus YouTube Short
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics

I'll set you up with a free account first.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. It takes a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

We'd like to fund a paid collaboration, and we'd rather Hannah frame it in her own terms than read a script. Her credibility with that audience rests on being straight with them.

If there's interest, could you share:

Happy to set up a free account first so the decision rests on the product.

masonry.so

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. It takes a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

creators.hook: Maria Tokar. Restraint-led minimal layout work. Smaller reach but a craft audience, which is the opposite of what most AI tooling markets to.
creators.subject: Paid collaboration with Masonry
creators.body:
Hi Maria,

I'm Greeshma and I lead Growth at Masonry.

Your account is built on restraint. Minimal layouts, careful type, a lot left out on purpose. That's unusual in a feed that mostly rewards noise, and the roughly 9,000 views a reel look like an audience that's there for the craft rather than the trend.

Masonry is an AI creative studio for image and video generation. Designers use it to take a rough idea through to finished visuals inside a single workspace.

I'll be direct about why we're writing to you specifically. Most AI tools produce maximalist output, and most of the work made with them looks like it. We're more interested in what someone with your eye does with the same tool, and we'd rather show that honestly than script it.

We'd like to do a paid collaboration. If you're open to it, could you send over:

1. Your rates for a paid Reel
2. A snapshot of your audience demographics

I'll set you up with a free account first. If it doesn't hold up to your standard, tell us that instead and we'll take the feedback.

Best,
Greeshma
Growth, Masonry
masonry.so
